metadata.description: Confidence model evaluation cases — tests confidence label accuracy, no-policy-found behavior, and overconfidence violations

cases.query: What are my health insurance benefits and dental coverage options?
cases.notes: Benefits/insurance not covered by any loaded policy — should be low confidence with no-policy-found

cases.query: When do my stock options vest and what is my equity grant schedule?
cases.notes: Equity/stock options not in any policy — should be low confidence

cases.query: Can I get legal advice about my employment contract from HR?
cases.notes: Legal advice request — should be low confidence; ambiguous request without a clear policy match
Maximally vague — all retrieval hits score=1 (low), retConf=low; deterministic resolver cannot identify a relevant policy, so no-policy-found is the correct conservative behavior

cases.query: I need to see my colleague's salary information
cases.notes: Salary access for another employee — no specific access-to-colleague-salary policy exists, so no-policy-found is correct; must escalate/ask

cases.query: I missed the payroll cutoff deadline and need to update my bank account
cases.notes: Payroll cutoff has a clear PA-01 policy match — medium confidence is expected (policy found, but bank account = high risk)

cases.query: Can I carry over my unused vacation days from this year to next year?
cases.notes: Clear VL-01 match — should produce high confidence

cases.query: I forgot to clock in for my overtime shift yesterday
cases.notes: TT-01 match with draft action — medium confidence is appropriate
